name: tailwind-styled-v4-monorepo
description: Monorepo for tailwind-styled-v4 — Rust-powered, compiler-driven, RSC-aware styling

scripts.build: npm run build:rust && npm run build:packages
scripts.test: npm run test:rust && npm run test:js
scripts.dev: npm run dev -w packages/shared -w packages/compiler -w packages/scanner -w packages/engine -w packages/core -w packages/runtime -w packages/runtime-css -w packages/analyzer -w packages/animate -w packages/theme -w packages/plugin -w packages/next -w packages/vite -w packages/rspack
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/shared -w packages/analyzer -w packages/animate -w packages/theme -w packages/plugin -w packages/preset -w packages/compiler -w packages/scanner -w packages/engine -w packages/cli -w packages/devtools -w packages/runtime-css -w packages/runtime -w packages/vite -w packages/vscode -w packages/rspack -w packages/next -w packages/core -w packages/vue -w packages/svelte -w packages/testing -w packages/storybook-addon -w packages/plugin-registry
scripts.test:js: node --test packages/runtime/test/index.test.mjs packages/compiler/test/nativeBridge.test.mjs packages/compiler/test/subcomponent.test.mjs packages/compiler/test/shake-v47.test.mjs packages/scanner/test/parse-v46.test.mjs packages/animate/test/animate.test.mjs packages/theme/test/theme.test.mjs packages/plugin/test/plugin.test.mjs packages/engine/test/engine.test.mjs packages/shared/test/shared.test.mjs packages/analyzer/test/analyzer.test.mjs packages/analyzer/test/analyzer-esm.test.mjs packages/next/test/next.test.mjs packages/vite/test/vite.test.mjs packages/rspack/test/rspack.test.mjs packages/preset/test/preset.test.mjs packages/runtime-css/test/runtime-css.test.mjs packages/cli/test/cli.test.mjs packages/cli/test/bench-massive.test.mjs
